title: Everything is a totem
description: Turns all the items in your inventory to totems of undying.
body:
# Everything is a totem
### Description
This datapack changes all the items in the player's inventories to have a totem of undying effect.


![Preview](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/rd-d/ALs6j_Ha1mqdZo3z0ANYWpgdkZDXEU5wEenvGaoRt9QwgIoo4xJmquvcE_5SLj4-GcVqNSkb7SFYzo5dz5Gc8vCJ4KmCnFo6JBv2Z-yi64tX7brLe3FhgLOG3LTBp9DjZ-UXCZ9-tt2-55jCsoqgK51SNk9vTTPF9zZ_jwm0V4w-cWhNm0UnEcTx6XHjflK669t7FDq627xxc2RXFltdfNmyGZNBmOrn6RTk_4aA_F37YXLwyt5J7ttQCjSPrcRZPhq91M1PCqEQqjQAIWriQzqxtYBni-a6Gxvcm8Z16YK9IMfXm5ie0ZNtLknMZQwBOFVzTLTj_JoInvAHGoBqvET2HKrKdd59CzC5CrfI_yqXwGlS8j9v1NYjCrHUz84w032mkWZsD_4CFNvVfhbmj-KbjcEqtPoU67mC4giyuJdYuCTuMIhqD9xIaqesrarrGglyonYK1dPc9ns6RSIbCmnLEPv6Oi4jqnUeTY0LcI8aJWsuUhMdZDaFu4gGYoyXBBIBE9gCsKZncQsi-a9JrVtuf5twfFfF-mbqiGByzJVdpXktQSoeHPJRaKoVT8Vxtvkh8t6CmMPp_d-tH6GhTDhODMhJBgkvxJB03Eg0z1uV2ccLGrsE4OP3_6j-H9vwUQmRMIM_jyyR80zWvXc-uT6BOVR8-qrllXB4jY9OPKMwmV-znhFdwUQzCRNSAiZlGYc11O-EmdJCbkop48ptaO8z5yMcjxavZ56iat3WJFjgZrKKcYVD6vj3zY0kKixU-ttsWrBt5ygnmxxMy_p-IbIZB0wDTo6Y28mhrJVGT771aCggCrM6oOTgITsFWhj1DWS8UwH_BRltNf_zVgbecZFrxwb4nO5o1jMLdJ6o--kvsU-NQoESeSDeohbhpB4-b9J_QtjWHZ1BT_CaVkQvoLkeLzMnu2yoO03LHKmJqtmoo9CPX_euMoL_NwcA7qvyHG3pDS3f5ma8DF24ohB3_raVTeT8M81Vcz9gbhgzGHJA_Fhpdl13bl4oKrkkvp2fIcfbecRAhFxof9tkUR2Uyjsf6hVsrh-hVbk34-uafB6cbSypvFhyBPeVTbStB5njE8-FXsUU5THXyZAs3supmWsAabGUIJE1d5wgNiLsw1xwQWAIn_r_5HAYvF-Quw=w1555-h743?auditContext=prefetch)

### Supported versions:
- 1.21.11
- 1.21.10
- 1.21.9

### Technical information
It uses an item modifier, adding a `death_protection` component to the items everytime the player gets an item without that component in their inventory so, it is very light weight and optimized.
